    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

    missing = df["TotalCharges"].isnull().sum()
    not_missing = df["TotalCharges"].notnull().sum()

    plt.bar(["Missing", "Not Missing"], [missing, not_missing])
    plt.title("Missing Values in TotalCharges")
    plt.ylabel("Count")
    plt.show()
